apocalypse: Muscular male, gray-blue skin, bald head, angular metallic blue lips, sharp ridged facial features, glowing white eyes, armored techno-organic suit with silver and blue detailing, and broad shoulder pads.
aaron_davis: Male, African-American, dark brown skin, short black hair, athletic build. Wears a sleek purple-and-black suit with green accents, clawed gloves, a flowing cape, and a high-tech mask covering his face. Known for agility and advanced gadgetry.
abigail_brand: Female, light-skinned with a greenish undertone, short bright green hair, slender but athletic build, wears a black tactical uniform with S.W.O.R.D. insignia, fingerless gloves, and a utility belt. Often seen exuding confidence and wielding intense energy-based powers.
alicia_masters: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, blonde hair in soft waves, slim build, gentle features, often seen in simple, elegant attire. Typically portrayed with serene expression and slightly unfocused gaze, reflecting her blindness.
betty_ross: Athletic female, Caucasian with fair skin, long dark brown hair, red eyes. Red She-Hulk form features red skin, glowing yellow eyes, and black, clawed hands. Often wears a black and red bodysuit with armored detailing, radiating raw strength.
bobbi_morse: Athletic white woman with fair skin, wavy blonde hair, and a toned build. She typically wears a sleek, black-and-white tactical bodysuit with blue-tinted goggles, wielding dual batons as weapons.
bobby_drake: Male, white, fair skin, short brown hair, lean athletic build; often depicted with an icy bluish-white complexion or completely encased in ice, showcasing his cryokinetic powers. Usually seen in X-Men team attire or sleek icy forms.
brock_rumlow: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short dark brown hair, muscular build. Wears a black tactical combat suit with a white skull emblem on the chest, black gloves, utility belt, and boots. Often seen with a mask covering the lower half of his face.
bucky_barnes: Male, white, fair skin, shoulder-length dark brown hair, athletic and muscular build, metal cybernetic left arm, tactical black combat suit with a silver star emblem, occasionally wears a mask or goggles, often wields a rifle or combat knife.
clint_barton: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short blonde hair, athletic build. Typically wears a sleeveless purple suit with a "H" emblem, a quiver strapped to his back, and carries a bow; sometimes dons a black tactical suit with a mask as Ronin.
colleen_wing: Athletic Asian woman with light skin, long straight black hair. Wears a practical martial arts outfit, often white or light-colored, with a katana as her signature weapon. Confident and determined expression, exuding strength and discipline.
crystal: Female, fair-skinned, wavy bright red-orange hair, slender build. Wears a yellow bodysuit with a black design resembling a lightning bolt, often depicted with a tiara-like headpiece, capable of manipulating elements like fire, water, earth, and air.
danny_rand: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short blonde hair, athletic martial artist build. Wears a green sleeveless jumpsuit with a deep V-neck, yellow dragon emblem on chest, yellow mask, sash belt, and glowing fists when channeling chi powers.
daredevil_matt_murdock: Male, fair-skinned, short auburn hair, lean muscular build. Wears a red devil-themed costume with horns on the cowl, billy clubs in holster, covered eyes suggesting blindness. Signature senses heightened due to radioactive accident.
david_haller: Male, white, pale skin, unkempt dark brown hair often styled upwards, lean athletic build, casual yet disheveled attire like jackets or t-shirts, with an intense, haunted expression; sometimes portrayed with glowing eyes to signify psychic powers.
davos: Male, East Asian, light tan skin, shaved head, lean muscular build; typically wears a red martial arts uniform with a black serpent emblem on the chest, bare arms, and wraps on forearms. Often exudes a focused, intense demeanor.
doctor_octopus: Middle-aged white male, pale skin, thinning brown hair with a bowl cut, stocky build, wearing a green jumpsuit with yellow accents, and four mechanical tentacle-like arms attached to a harness on his back.
doctor_strange: Male, Caucasian, pale skin, dark brown hair streaked with gray at the temples, lean athletic build, goatee, mystical blue Cloak of Levitation with gold trim, Eye of Agamotto amulet, and ornate sorcerer’s robes with astral energy effects.
felicia_hardy: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, platinum blonde wavy hair, athletic and curvaceous build, black catsuit with white fur trim, plunging neckline, claw-like gloves, domino mask, often accessorized with a silver cat pendant.
frank_castle: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short dark hair, muscular build. Often wears a black T-shirt with a distinctive white skull emblem, paired with black tactical pants and gear. Rugged and intense expression, visibly scarred face.
frank_castle_jr: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short black hair, muscular build, iconic black tactical suit with a white skull emblem on the chest, utility belt, and weaponry; stern expression, embodying a grim and relentless demeanor.
frankie_raye: Female, fair-skinned, golden-blonde hair, slender athletic build. Typically depicted with glowing golden skin when transformed, her body emanates energy. She wears a sleek, fire-themed costume with red and gold hues, symbolizing her cosmic-powered Nova form.
franklin_richards: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, blond hair, lean build. Often depicted wearing a blue bodysuit with a "4" logo referencing the Fantastic Four or casual clothing; youthful appearance with a subtle cosmic glow hinting at immense reality-warping powers.
franklin_storm_father: Older male, Caucasian, pale skin, short gray hair, clean-shaven, medium build. Typically dressed in formal attire, such as a lab coat or suit, reflecting his role as a respected physician and scientist.
galactus: Male, towering, metallic-skinned humanoid with a deep lavender tone, glowing white eyes, and a heavily muscled build. Wears an ornate, technologically advanced purple and blue armor with a helmet featuring vertical horn-like extensions. Radiates immense cosmic energy.
gamora: Female, green-skinned, humanoid, gold-tinged long dark hair, athletic and toned build. Typically wears a form-fitting black or metallic combat suit with armor elements, equipped with weapons. Distinctive glowing eyes and confident, battle-hardened demeanor.
ganke_lee: Male, Asian, light tan skin tone, short black hair, average build, typically wears casual streetwear like hoodies and jeans, often depicted with a friendly, approachable demeanor, no powers but known as Miles Morales’ tech-savvy best friend.
harold_meachum: Middle-aged white male, pale skin, thin graying hair, lean build. Often depicted in a formal business suit with a cane due to a leg injury. Stern expression with a calculating demeanor.
jean_grey: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, long wavy red hair, slender athletic build. Often wears a form-fitting green and yellow costume as Marvel Girl, though notable as Phoenix with fiery aura or Dark Phoenix with a darker, intense, flame-like energy.
jeryn_hogarth: Male, white, fair skin, short neatly groomed brown hair, average build, typically dressed in professional business attire with a suit and tie, often carrying a briefcase or appearing in a corporate setting.
jessica_drew: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, long dark brown hair, athletic build; wears a red, skintight suit with yellow spider emblem, black web-patterned accents, and yellow eye lenses; known for bioelectric "venom blasts" and wall-crawling abilities.
jessica_jones: Jessica Jones is a Caucasian woman with fair skin, dark brown hair often unkempt, and an athletic build. She typically wears casual, rugged clothing like jeans and a leather jacket, reflecting her no-nonsense persona and superhuman strength.
johnny_blaze: Male, Caucasian, pale skin, short sandy blond hair, muscular build. Transforms into flaming skull with fiery blue-orange aura. Signature look includes a black leather jacket with silver spikes, matching pants, boots, and chains enveloped in flames.
johnny_storm: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short blond hair, athletic build. Often depicted engulfed in flames when powered up, with glowing orange-red radiance. Without flames, wears a form-fitting blue Fantastic Four suit with a "4" insignia on the chest.
jonah_jameson: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, graying slicked-back hair with a distinct toothbrush mustache, average build, often seen in a button-down shirt, tie, and suspenders; intense expression with a trademark cigar adding to his brash demeanor.
joy_meachum: Caucasian female, fair skin, blonde shoulder-length straight hair, slim build; typically seen in stylish, modern business attire, often wearing neutral or soft tones reflecting her corporate executive role.
kamala_khan: Teenage girl, South Asian descent, medium brown skin, wavy dark brown hair, average build. Wears a blue, red, and gold costume with a lightning bolt emblem, a red scarf, and a domino mask. Powers include shape-shifting and "embiggening" abilities.
kate_bishop: Athletic young woman, Caucasian with fair skin, long dark brown hair, lean build. Wears a sleek purple and black tactical suit with archery gear, often accompanied by a quiver and bow. Confident demeanor, sharp focus, and poised stance.
killgrave: Male, Caucasian, pale purple-toned skin, slicked-back dark purple hair, lean build, sharp facial features, typically dressed in a refined suit—often dark or purple-hued. Known for his unnerving, confident demeanor and mind-control abilities through pheromones.
kingpin: Male, Caucasian, pale skin, bald, massive and bulky build, typically dressed in an elegant white suit with a black dress shirt and purple tie, often wielding a walking cane as a signature accessory.
kurt_marko: Male, Caucasian, pale complexion, balding with short gray hair, stocky build, often seen in a lab coat or formal suit, portraying a stern demeanor; associated with his role as a scientist and abusive father figure.
kurt_wagner: Male, blue-skinned, pointed ears, glowing yellow eyes, short indigo hair, lean athletic build, prehensile spaded tail. Wears a red-and-black V-patterned costume with white gloves and boots; often surrounded by a purple "bamf" smoky aura when teleporting.
lei_kung: Male, East Asian, light tan skin, bald head with a long white Fu Manchu mustache and beard, muscular build, traditional golden martial arts robes with a high collar, intricate patterns, and a commanding presence.
leonard_samson: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, long wavy green hair, muscular build. Wears a form-fitting red and black costume with a golden lightning bolt emblem across the chest. Often depicted with a confident demeanor and superhuman strength-driven physique.
lilandra_neramani: Female, pale lavender skin, metallic feather-like hair resembling a headdress, slender athletic build, often wears ornate high-collared Shi’ar royal armor with intricate designs, sharp avian facial features, and commanding presence representative of her alien Shi’ar heritage.
lin_lie: Male, East Asian, light tan skin, short black hair, athletic build; typically wears a modernized green and gold martial arts-inspired outfit with intricate patterns, wields the Sword of Fu Xi, later shows glowing chi energy as Iron Fist.
lisa_castle: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, long blonde hair, slender build; often seen in casual, modest attire with a soft and approachable demeanor, no superhuman powers, typically depicted as a supportive, empathetic family figure in her narrative.
logan: Male, Caucasian, rugged tanned skin, dark brown tousled hair with muttonchop sideburns, muscular and stocky build. Wears a tank top or leather jacket, jeans, sometimes incorporates claws (retractable adamantium), often smoking a cigar, piercing gaze, exudes raw ferocity.
luke_cage: Male, African-American, dark brown skin, bald or very short hair, tall and muscular build. Often wears a tight yellow T-shirt, jeans, and a silver headband or wristbands in classic depictions; possesses unbreakable skin and superhuman strength.
lyja: Female, light green-skinned Skrull, sleek shoulder-length auburn hair, athletic build, often seen wearing a purple and black form-fitting jumpsuit with metallic accents; capable of shapeshifting and generating energy blasts from her hands.
madelyne_pryor: Female, Caucasian, pale skin, long fiery red hair, curvaceous build; wears a black leather bodysuit with revealing cutouts, thigh-high boots, crimson cape, and a spiked headpiece; exudes a dark, mystical energy with glowing green eyes.
malcolm_ducasse: Male, Black, medium-brown skin tone, short black hair, athletic build, typically dressed in well-fitted professional attire like button-up shirts and blazers, associated with a clean and polished look.
mar_vell: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short blond hair, athletic build. Wears a red bodysuit with a gold star emblem on the chest, blue gloves, boots, and waistband, accented with golden braces. Signature cosmic energy aura and Nega-Bands on wrists.
maria_castle: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, long brown hair, slender build. Often depicted in casual attire or modest dresses, with a warm and approachable demeanor. No superpowers; remembered as Frank Castle's (Punisher) late wife in his tragic backstory.
mary_jane_watson: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, long vibrant red hair, slender build. Often depicted wearing trendy casual clothing or chic dresses, emphasizing her fashion-forward persona. Frequently associated with a confident expression and striking green eyes.
matt_murdock_daredevil: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short red hair, athletic and toned build. Wears a crimson, form-fitting Daredevil suit with "DD" insignia on the chest, a billy club holstered at his side, and a mask covering his eyes.
mephisto: Male, red-skinned with a demonic, heavily muscular build, long flowing black hair, sharp angular features, clawed hands, and glowing yellow eyes; wears a red tattered tunic-like cloak, often surrounded by hellish flames and an aura of menace.
moira_mactaggert: Female, white, fair skin, light brown shoulder-length hair, slender build. Typically dressed in professional attire like a lab coat or tailored clothing, reflecting her role as a geneticist. Occasionally seen in modest, practical outfits with glasses as a defining accessory.
morbius: Male, pale Caucasian skin, long jet-black hair, lean athletic build; sharp fangs, gaunt cheekbones, and red-tinted eyes; black and crimson bodysuit with a high-collared cloak, bat-like features accentuated by dark vampiric presence.
muneeba_khan: Female, South Asian, medium-brown skin tone, dark brown hair usually tied back, average build, typically dressed in traditional shalwar kameez with vibrant patterns, often accessorized with modest jewelry, exuding a calm and motherly demeanor.
mystique: Female, blue-skinned, glowing yellow eyes, fiery red hair, athletic build. Signature white sleeveless dress featuring a side slit, dark gloves, boots, a skull belt, and an effortlessly commanding demeanor. Known for her shape-shifting abilities and stealth.
natasha_romanoff: Female, fair-skinned, athletic build, red shoulder-length hair, piercing green eyes; wears a black, tight-fitting tactical suit with a widow emblem, utility belt, and wrist gauntlets emitting electric "widow's bite" shocks.
nathan_summers: Male, Caucasian, rugged tan skin, short gray-white hair, muscular and bulky build, glowing cybernetic left eye, metal left arm, military-style combat gear with heavy pouches, often wielding large futuristic firearms, and a scarred, weathered face.
nick_fury: Male, African-American, dark brown skin, bald, athletic build, eyepatch over left eye, often seen in a black tactical outfit with a high collar and utility belt, carrying a holstered weapon. Rugged and commanding presence.
norman_osborn: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, slicked-back reddish-brown hair, athletic build. Often seen as Green Goblin with a maniacal grin, wearing a green and purple goblin-themed suit; as Iron Patriot, in a red, white, and blue high-tech armored suit.
odessa_drake: Female, light-skinned, sleek black hair, slender build. Wears a sophisticated black-and-gold outfit with ornate patterns, often complemented by a high collar and cape. Holds an air of elegance and cunning, exuding confidence befitting her role.
orson_randall: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, slicked-back dark blond hair with a mustache, rugged athletic build, wearing a vintage green-and-gold martial arts uniform with dragon motifs, often seen with glowing fists due to his Iron Fist chi powers.
peter_parker: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, brown hair, lean athletic build. Wears a red-and-blue spandex suit with black web patterns, large white eyepieces on the mask, and a prominent spider emblem on the chest. Agile and strong with wall-crawling abilities.
peter_parker_spider_man: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short brown hair, lean athletic build, wears iconic red and blue web-patterned suit with black webbing design and white eye lenses on the mask, often depicted with web-shooters on wrists.
peter_quill: Male, Caucasian, fair-toned skin, short sandy brown hair, athletic build, red leather jacket, grayish utility pants, twin blasters, and iconic silver helmet with red glowing eyes.
phoenix_force: Androgynous, luminous fiery being with undefined human features, glowing golden skin, flaming red-orange hair, lean ethereal build, enveloped in a blazing aura resembling a fiery bird motif, embodying cosmic energy and immense power.
rachel_cole_alves: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, dark brown hair in a shoulder-length bob, athletic build, wears tactical black body armor with a white skull emblem, equipped with firearms and combat gear, fiercely determined expression.
rachel_summers: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, red shoulder-length layered hair with golden highlights, athletic build. Wears a black bodysuit with gold accents, a red Phoenix symbol on the chest, and sometimes features glowing yellow hound markings over her face. Psychic powers.
red_skull: Male, fair-skinned (under disguise) or red-skinned skull-like visage, bald, lean but muscular build. Wears a sleek black military-style uniform with Hydra emblem, often wielding advanced weaponry. His iconic appearance includes a grotesque, crimson skeletal face symbolizing his moniker "Red Skull."
remy_lebeau: Male, Caucasian with a light tan, auburn-brown hair, lean athletic build, glowing red-on-black eyes, trench coat over a body-hugging metallic purple and black suit, fingerless gloves, wields a metal staff, and often holds glowing, charged playing cards.
rick_jones: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short sandy brown hair, athletic build. Often seen in casual attire like a leather jacket or t-shirt and jeans; historically depicted with a confident, youthful demeanor. Occasionally portrayed with cosmic energy or superhero associations.
rio_morales: Female, Afro-Latina, medium brown skin tone, dark curly hair often styled in a low bun or ponytail, average build, casual yet professional attire such as blouses and slacks, a kind, warm demeanor reflecting her role as a community-focused nurse.
robbie_reyes: Male, Hispanic/Latino, tan skin, short black hair with a slight wave, lean athletic build. Wears a black leather jacket with a white stripe and silver accents, often depicted with a flaming cracked black skull when transformed.
rogue: Female, Caucasian with a fair complexion, long wavy brown hair with a distinctive white streak, athletic build, wearing a green jumpsuit, brown leather jacket, and yellow gloves/boots. Often associated with absorbing powers through touch.
sam_wilson: Male, African American, medium-brown skin, short black hair, athletic build. Wears a white, red, and blue Captain America suit with wings, a star emblem on his chest, and red goggles. Often seen with his Vibranium shield.
scott_lang: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short light-brown hair, lean athletic build; red and black armored suit with silver accents, helmet featuring insect-like antennae and a transparent visor, ability to shrink or grow in size using Pym particles.
scott_summers: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short brown hair, athletic build, often wears a red quartz visor or optic ruby lenses, typically dressed in a blue-and-yellow spandex costume with an "X" emblem, emits powerful red optic energy blasts.
sharon_xavier: Female, white, fair skin, dark brown hair styled neatly, slender build. Typically dressed in elegant, modest clothing reflecting her upper-class status, with no distinctive costume or powers, as she is a non-superpowered, supportive matriarchal figure in Xavier family lore.
sky: Female, light brown skin, long curly black hair, athletic build, glowing blue eyes, wears a sleek, sky-blue bodysuit with silver accents, emanates faint energy trails, and often surrounded by a soft aura resembling drifting clouds.
steve_rogers: Male, white, fair skin, blonde hair, athletic/muscular build. Wears a blue suit with white-scaled chest armor, a star emblem, red gloves and boots, and carries a circular shield with red, white, and blue concentric design featuring a central star.
sue_storm: Caucasian female, fair skin, blonde shoulder-length hair, athletic build. Wears a skintight blue suit with black accents and the "4" emblem on her chest. Often depicted with a calm, determined expression, and the ability to turn invisible or create force fields.
thaddeus_ross: Older white male, weathered complexion, gray-white swept-back hair, bushy mustache, tall, broad-shouldered, military bearing, olive-green uniform with medals and rank insignia, often stern or scowling expression.
thanos: Male, purple-skinned, bald with a ridged chin, massive and heavily muscular build. Wears golden armor with a blue under-suit, often adorned with the Infinity Gauntlet—a gold glove embedded with six glowing, multicolored Infinity Stones.
the_catholic_church: The Catholic Church is not a physical character in canon but is often symbolized as a collective entity or conceptual representation, such as with religious imagery, leaders like the Pope, or a personification involving robes, crosses, and sacred vestments.
the_devil_hulk: Male, dark-toned reptilian skin, bald, muscular and hulking build, glowing orange eyes, jagged teeth, and sharp claws. Wears no clothing, exuding a feral and monstrous demeanor, embodying pure rage and malice.
the_foreigner: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short slicked-back white hair, lean athletic build, sharp facial features. Wears a sleek dark suit, often with a tie, exuding an understated yet professional assassin's demeanor; no overt markers or powers visible.
the_jones_family: The Jones Family features a diverse group: varying genders, races, and builds. Each member wears everyday casual attire, emphasizing individuality through minimal costume elements. Their signature trait is a unified, warm, approachable demeanor reflecting their familial bond.
thor_odinson: Male, fair-skinned, shoulder-length blond hair, muscular build. Wears a winged silver helmet, red cape, black armored suit with circular chest plates, and wields the enchanted hammer Mjolnir, crackling with lightning. Nordic and commanding presence.
trish_tilby: Female, Caucasian, fair skin, shoulder-length blonde hair, slender build. Typically seen in professional attire, such as tailored blouses or blazers, reflecting her role as a journalist. Often appears holding a microphone or reporting on-camera.
uatu_the_watcher: Male, bald alien with pale, almost white skin; large, elongated head and expressive features; tall, imposing build; wears a long blue cape with a high collar over a white tunic and golden accents.
valeria_richards: A young Caucasian female with fair skin, long blonde hair, and a slim build. She typically wears a blue and black futuristic bodysuit with the Fantastic Four logo, representing her super-genius intellect and ties to the Richards family.
wade_wilson: Male, Caucasian, pale scarred skin, bald under mask, athletic muscular build, red-and-black tactical suit with utility belt, twin katanas on his back, often dual-wields pistols, masked face with expressive black eye markings, regenerative healing factor.
walter_hardy: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, slicked-back silver hair, lean athletic build. Typically dressed in an elegant black suit with gloves, carrying a suave demeanor. Often associated with a thief’s toolkit and cat-like agility.
wendell_rand: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short brown hair, athletic build. Wears a martial arts-style outfit with a green tunic, yellow sash, and dragon emblem. Often depicted with a confident demeanor, tied to his mystical connection to K'un-Lun and martial arts mastery.
wonder_man: Male, Caucasian, fair skin, short dark brown hair, tall and muscular build. Wears a black body suit with a red "W" emblem on the chest, red belts and armbands, glowing red eyes symbolizing his ionic energy powers.
yusuf_khan: Male, South Asian, medium-brown skin, short black hair with some gray, average build. Wears traditional kurta or casual clothing, often depicted with a kind and serious demeanor. No superpowers; a caring father figure.
